@graph.name: The AIIA Method - Our 4-Phase AI Implementation Framework
@graph.description: AIIA's proven 4-phase framework for AI integration: Find, Implement, Measure, and Expand. A structured approach that takes businesses from opportunity identification to scaled AI deployment.

about.name: Find Phase
about.description: Identify high-impact AI opportunities within your existing business processes - pinpointing where automation and intelligence deliver measurable ROI fastest.

about.name: Implement Phase
about.description: Deploy custom AI integrations and automations tailored to your tech stack, team workflows, and business objectives - with zero disruption to live operations.

about.name: Measure Phase
about.description: Track performance against defined success metrics - time saved, cost reduced, revenue influenced - so every AI investment is accountable and visible.

about.name: Expand Phase
about.description: Scale proven AI systems across more teams, departments, and use cases - compounding returns as the organization builds internal AI fluency.
